title: Brain OS Entity
description: Operational state of a tracked entity — project, deal, campaign, account, or any persistent work object

type.description: Entity type — project, deal, campaign, account, feature, etc.

mode.description: Intent: active = working on it, parked = intentionally paused, incubating = thinking stage, archived = done or killed

mode_reason.description: Why this mode — required for parked/incubating

momentum.description: Is this entity actually moving forward?

next_move.description: Concrete next action — not 'think about X'

evidence_of_progress.description: What actually shipped or moved since last update

metadata.description: Flexible key-value pairs — path, repo, owner, tags, etc.

created_at.description: ISO date when entity was first created

last_updated.description: ISO date of last update — used for staleness calculation
